rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Sanctions Against David C. Simmons
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion to Expunge Lis Pendens and for Sanction is granted. Reasonable attorney's fees and costs are awarded in the amount of $1,430. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, January 17, 2018.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ERNEST V RHINE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer And Consolidate Santa Cruz Action; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Larry Larson, Esq. In Support
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion to Transfer and Consolidate Santa Cruz Action is granted. The action that Petitioner originally filed in Santa Cruz County Superior Court (Case Number 17PR00346) is to be transferred to this Court. Following transfer, the cases are consolidated for the purposes of trial and discovery, pursuant to CCP §§ 403 and 1048. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, January 17, 2018.
